# discord_channel (Data Source)

Fetches a single Discord channel by id.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "discord_channel" "general" {
  channel_id = "456789012345678901"
}

output "general_name" {
  value = data.discord_channel.general.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `channel_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the channel.

### Read-Only

- `category` (String) Snowflake ID of the parent category, if any.
- `name` (String) Channel name.
- `nsfw` (Boolean) Whether the channel is marked NSFW.
- `position` (Number) Position of the channel.
- `server_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the guild the channel belongs to.
- `topic` (String) Channel topic.
- `type` (Number) Channel type id.
